tools.name: track_application
tools.title: Track bursary application
tools.description: Look up the current status of a Bursary KE application by its tracking number (BKE-XXXXXX). To protect applicant privacy, the applicant's phone number OR national ID must also be provided as a verification value — without a matching value nothing is returned. Never returns names or other PII.

tracking_number.description: Public tracking number issued at submission, e.g. BKE-ABC123.

verification_type.description: Which private detail is being used to verify ownership of the application.

verification_value.description: The parent's phone number (any Kenyan format) or national ID, matching verification_type.

tools.name: list_active_bursaries
tools.title: List active bursary adverts
tools.description: List currently open Bursary KE adverts. Optionally filter by county or ward. Returns title, county, ward, deadline, and required documents so applicants know what to prepare.

county.description: Kenyan county name to filter by, e.g. 'Nairobi'.

limit.description: Max number of adverts to return (default 20).
